body.title: agent_datacenter: IMAP bus tests — mailboxes, routing, IDLE, 24hr retention
body.result: tests/test_bus.py: 17 tests — mailbox lifecycle, Router send/resolve/errors, fetch+seen semantics, IDLE push (<2s), 24hr retention (purge/retain/seen/index update). All pass.
body.description:
Tests for the IMAP bus: mailbox creation, message routing via comms://, IDLE push, and 24hr retention.

Proposed shape:
- agent_datacenter/tests/test_bus.py:
  Uses Python IMAP stub (in-process, no system Dovecot needed)
  def test_mailbox_creation(): create_mailbox('CC.0'); 'CC.0' in list_mailboxes()
  def test_message_routing_direct(): Router.send('comms://CC.0', envelope); unseen_count('CC.0') == 1
  def test_message_routing_shared(): Router.send('comms://Shared', envelope); unseen_count('Shared') == 1
  def test_fetch_marks_seen(): fetch_unseen() → envelope returned; unseen_count == 0
  def test_idle_push(): subscribe to 'CC.0' via IDLE; send message; notification received within 2s
  def test_24hr_retention(): create message with sent_at=now-25h; purge_old_messages(); message gone
  def test_seen_within_24hr_retained(): SEEN message at 23hr: still present

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/tests/test_bus.py

Design rules:
- Python stub IMAP server used in tests (not Dovecot) — established in T-adc-imap-impl-decision

Scope boundary:
IN: mailbox lifecycle, routing, IDLE, retention tests — all against Python stub
OUT: Dovecot production integration tests (marked integration, run separately)

Test plan:
- pytest tests/test_bus.py passes without system IMAP server installed
- IDLE test uses asyncio with timeout to avoid hanging
